faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Mill Basin home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, cream-colored larvae on fabrics, and small tan or brown moths flying in bedrooms or closets. You may also notice damaged rugs, upholstery, or other natural fiber items. Our Mill Basin technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and identify the moth species.

Minor infestations in a single room cost less, while whole-home treatments with multiple follow-ups are more extensive. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.
